title: [Updated on July 6, 05:00(UTC)] Known Issues Following the July 1 Patch
original_title: [Updated on July 6, 05:00(UTC)] Known Issues Following the July 1 Patch
author: msnadmin
summary: The MapleStory N July 1 known-issues notice records follow-up fixes through July 6. Tropical Adventure clear rewards increased from 50 to 100 coins, the level-160 Monster Park Express Pass issue was fixed, and Morass story-skip access was restored with an extra login-and-map step for earlier completions.

sections.title: Resolved and adjusted
items: Tropical Adventure now awards 100 coins per clear instead of 50, effective after July 3 at 06:50 UTC.
Characters at level 160 can use the Monster Park Express Pass after the fix.
Other characters on an account can skip completed Morass story quests again.

sections.title: Morass follow-up
items: For accounts that completed the Morass story before July 3 at 07:00 UTC, the completing character must log in and revisit Morass - Trueffet Square before the skip becomes available to other characters.
The official notice retains resolution timestamps and should be checked for changes after MPStorys' verification date.
